name: sso-rules-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the sso-rules plugin — devstack invariants for apps behind oauth2-proxy + Traefik ForwardAuth.

plugins.name: sso-rules
plugins.description: Devstack invariants for apps behind oauth2-proxy + Traefik ForwardAuth (Plane, Outline, Penpot, SurfSense). Enforces SSO chain, bypass routers, build patterns, logout shape, session TTL, and compose hygiene.
